Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains. [Headlines & Insights](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/headlines-insights/index.html). [Technology, Media & Telecom](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/index.html). 01/11/2023 • 5 minutes read. [Mario Bersem](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/auteurs/mario-bersem/index.html). Retail chains are increasingly offering advertising space in their own channels: on the website, in the app, and also on screens in stores. Hema recently launched its own media network that connects all screens in its 280 stores.

Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains. [Headlines & Insights](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/headlines-insights/index.html). [Technology, Media & Telecom](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/index.html). 01/11/2023 • 5 minutes read. [Mario Bersem](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/auteurs/mario-bersem/index.html). Retail chains are increasingly offering advertising space in their own channels: on the website, in the app, and also on screens in stores. Hema recently launched its own media network that connects all screens in its 280 stores. Hema is following supermarket chains like Albert Heijn and Plus, for whom retail media is already a lucrative side income.

Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains. [Headlines & Insights](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/headlines-insights/index.html). [Technology, Media & Telecom](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/index.html). 01/11/2023 • 5 minutes read. [Mario Bersem](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/auteurs/mario-bersem/index.html). Retail chains are increasingly offering advertising space in their own channels: on the website, in the app, and also on screens in stores. Hema recently launched its own media network that connects all screens in its 280 stores. Hema is following supermarket chains like Albert Heijn and Plus, for whom retail media is already a lucrative side income. Where retailers have traditionally ranked among the biggest advertisers, they now also sell advertising.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: Retail chains are increasingly offering advertising space in their own channels: on the website, in the app, and also on screens in stores. Hema recently launched its own media network that connects all screens in its 280 stores. Hema is following supermarket chains like Albert Heijn and Plus, for whom retail media is already a lucrative side income. Where retailers have traditionally ranked among the biggest advertisers, they now also sell advertising. Retailers are increasingly offering suppliers ad space to advertise via their own channels.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: Hema recently launched its own media network that connects all screens in its 280 stores. Hema is following supermarket chains like Albert Heijn and Plus, for whom retail media is already a lucrative side income. Where retailers have traditionally ranked among the biggest advertisers, they now also sell advertising. Retailers are increasingly offering suppliers ad space to advertise via their own channels. And of course retailers use the channels themselves too: “Hamsteren!”, as a well-known slogan from a supermarket chain goes.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: Hema is following supermarket chains like Albert Heijn and Plus, for whom retail media is already a lucrative side income. Where retailers have traditionally ranked among the biggest advertisers, they now also sell advertising. Retailers are increasingly offering suppliers ad space to advertise via their own channels. And of course retailers use the channels themselves too: “Hamsteren!”, as a well-known slogan from a supermarket chain goes. It is not new that retailers highlight some suppliers’ products for a fee; that has happened for years in analogue form, for example through special promotions or shelves in the store.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: Where retailers have traditionally ranked among the biggest advertisers, they now also sell advertising. Retailers are increasingly offering suppliers ad space to advertise via their own channels. And of course retailers use the channels themselves too: “Hamsteren!”, as a well-known slogan from a supermarket chain goes. It is not new that retailers highlight some suppliers’ products for a fee; that has happened for years in analogue form, for example through special promotions or shelves in the store. What is new is the addition of their own digital channels and physical screens on the shop floor.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: Retailers are increasingly offering suppliers ad space to advertise via their own channels. And of course retailers use the channels themselves too: “Hamsteren!”, as a well-known slogan from a supermarket chain goes. It is not new that retailers highlight some suppliers’ products for a fee; that has happened for years in analogue form, for example through special promotions or shelves in the store. What is new is the addition of their own digital channels and physical screens on the shop floor. Entire new media networks are emerging: so-called retail media.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: And of course retailers use the channels themselves too: “Hamsteren!”, as a well-known slogan from a supermarket chain goes. It is not new that retailers highlight some suppliers’ products for a fee; that has happened for years in analogue form, for example through special promotions or shelves in the store. What is new is the addition of their own digital channels and physical screens on the shop floor. Entire new media networks are emerging: so-called retail media. Using retail media to offer digital advertising is part of an international trend that, for once, did not start in the United States but in China.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: It is not new that retailers highlight some suppliers’ products for a fee; that has happened for years in analogue form, for example through special promotions or shelves in the store. What is new is the addition of their own digital channels and physical screens on the shop floor. Entire new media networks are emerging: so-called retail media. Using retail media to offer digital advertising is part of an international trend that, for once, did not start in the United States but in China. In China, e-commerce platforms like Alibaba and JD.com started selling digital ad space more than twenty years ago.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: What is new is the addition of their own digital channels and physical screens on the shop floor. Entire new media networks are emerging: so-called retail media. Using retail media to offer digital advertising is part of an international trend that, for once, did not start in the United States but in China. In China, e-commerce platforms like Alibaba and JD.com started selling digital ad space more than twenty years ago. Retail media has also penetrated further in the United States than in Europe.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: Entire new media networks are emerging: so-called retail media. Using retail media to offer digital advertising is part of an international trend that, for once, did not start in the United States but in China. In China, e-commerce platforms like Alibaba and JD.com started selling digital ad space more than twenty years ago. Retail media has also penetrated further in the United States than in Europe. For example, retail giant Amazon already earns more from online advertising revenue than broadcasting giant YouTube.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: Using retail media to offer digital advertising is part of an international trend that, for once, did not start in the United States but in China. In China, e-commerce platforms like Alibaba and JD.com started selling digital ad space more than twenty years ago. Retail media has also penetrated further in the United States than in Europe. For example, retail giant Amazon already earns more from online advertising revenue than broadcasting giant YouTube. In 2022, it involved almost 38 billion dollars for Amazon, while YouTube stalled at about 30 billion dollars.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: In China, e-commerce platforms like Alibaba and JD.com started selling digital ad space more than twenty years ago. Retail media has also penetrated further in the United States than in Europe. For example, retail giant Amazon already earns more from online advertising revenue than broadcasting giant YouTube. In 2022, it involved almost 38 billion dollars for Amazon, while YouTube stalled at about 30 billion dollars. For 2023, Amazon expects 20% growth for its advertising arm.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: Retail media has also penetrated further in the United States than in Europe. For example, retail giant Amazon already earns more from online advertising revenue than broadcasting giant YouTube. In 2022, it involved almost 38 billion dollars for Amazon, while YouTube stalled at about 30 billion dollars. For 2023, Amazon expects 20% growth for its advertising arm. Retail media spend up 42%.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: For example, retail giant Amazon already earns more from online advertising revenue than broadcasting giant YouTube. In 2022, it involved almost 38 billion dollars for Amazon, while YouTube stalled at about 30 billion dollars. For 2023, Amazon expects 20% growth for its advertising arm. Retail media spend up 42%. In the Netherlands too, advertising spend via retail media is skyrocketing.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: In 2022, it involved almost 38 billion dollars for Amazon, while YouTube stalled at about 30 billion dollars. For 2023, Amazon expects 20% growth for its advertising arm. Retail media spend up 42%. In the Netherlands too, advertising spend via retail media is skyrocketing. According to Rogier Lammers, chair of the retail media taskforce at industry association VIA, spend rose by 42% in 2022.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: For 2023, Amazon expects 20% growth for its advertising arm. Retail media spend up 42%. In the Netherlands too, advertising spend via retail media is skyrocketing. According to Rogier Lammers, chair of the retail media taskforce at industry association VIA, spend rose by 42% in 2022. Advertising spend thus reached around 210 million euros, equal to 6% of total digital advertising spend.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: Retail media spend up 42%. In the Netherlands too, advertising spend via retail media is skyrocketing. According to Rogier Lammers, chair of the retail media taskforce at industry association VIA, spend rose by 42% in 2022. Advertising spend thus reached around 210 million euros, equal to 6% of total digital advertising spend. This is still relatively low compared to, for example, Germany or the United Kingdom.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: In the Netherlands too, advertising spend via retail media is skyrocketing. According to Rogier Lammers, chair of the retail media taskforce at industry association VIA, spend rose by 42% in 2022. Advertising spend thus reached around 210 million euros, equal to 6% of total digital advertising spend. This is still relatively low compared to, for example, Germany or the United Kingdom. ABN AMRO therefore expects solid growth in the coming years, driven in part by the current catch-up, see chart.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: According to Rogier Lammers, chair of the retail media taskforce at industry association VIA, spend rose by 42% in 2022. Advertising spend thus reached around 210 million euros, equal to 6% of total digital advertising spend. This is still relatively low compared to, for example, Germany or the United Kingdom. ABN AMRO therefore expects solid growth in the coming years, driven in part by the current catch-up, see chart. In Europe, Germany is ahead — not surprising, since an average German internet user has Amazon as their start page.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: Advertising spend thus reached around 210 million euros, equal to 6% of total digital advertising spend. This is still relatively low compared to, for example, Germany or the United Kingdom. ABN AMRO therefore expects solid growth in the coming years, driven in part by the current catch-up, see chart. In Europe, Germany is ahead — not surprising, since an average German internet user has Amazon as their start page. But Europe as a whole is about three years behind the United States, says Lammers, not to mention China where retail media has penetrated much further.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: This is still relatively low compared to, for example, Germany or the United Kingdom. ABN AMRO therefore expects solid growth in the coming years, driven in part by the current catch-up, see chart. In Europe, Germany is ahead — not surprising, since an average German internet user has Amazon as their start page. But Europe as a whole is about three years behind the United States, says Lammers, not to mention China where retail media has penetrated much further. Figures from Daniel Knapp of IAB Europe show that retail media spend in Europe averages 11% of total digital advertising spend, while in the US it is already heading towards 17% and China now leads with as much as 30%.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: ABN AMRO therefore expects solid growth in the coming years, driven in part by the current catch-up, see chart. In Europe, Germany is ahead — not surprising, since an average German internet user has Amazon as their start page. But Europe as a whole is about three years behind the United States, says Lammers, not to mention China where retail media has penetrated much further. Figures from Daniel Knapp of IAB Europe show that retail media spend in Europe averages 11% of total digital advertising spend, while in the US it is already heading towards 17% and China now leads with as much as 30%. Growing pains in retail media.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: In Europe, Germany is ahead — not surprising, since an average German internet user has Amazon as their start page. But Europe as a whole is about three years behind the United States, says Lammers, not to mention China where retail media has penetrated much further. Figures from Daniel Knapp of IAB Europe show that retail media spend in Europe averages 11% of total digital advertising spend, while in the US it is already heading towards 17% and China now leads with as much as 30%. Growing pains in retail media. All major retailers have discovered the potential of retail media and are setting up teams to develop their advertising arm.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: But Europe as a whole is about three years behind the United States, says Lammers, not to mention China where retail media has penetrated much further. Figures from Daniel Knapp of IAB Europe show that retail media spend in Europe averages 11% of total digital advertising spend, while in the US it is already heading towards 17% and China now leads with as much as 30%. Growing pains in retail media. All major retailers have discovered the potential of retail media and are setting up teams to develop their advertising arm. In some cases, these new teams must compete with their e-commerce colleagues who, until now, had the webshop and the online shopping experience to themselves.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: Figures from Daniel Knapp of IAB Europe show that retail media spend in Europe averages 11% of total digital advertising spend, while in the US it is already heading towards 17% and China now leads with as much as 30%. Growing pains in retail media. All major retailers have discovered the potential of retail media and are setting up teams to develop their advertising arm. In some cases, these new teams must compete with their e-commerce colleagues who, until now, had the webshop and the online shopping experience to themselves. Retail media teams want to sell ads.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: Growing pains in retail media. All major retailers have discovered the potential of retail media and are setting up teams to develop their advertising arm. In some cases, these new teams must compete with their e-commerce colleagues who, until now, had the webshop and the online shopping experience to themselves. Retail media teams want to sell ads. That sometimes leads to friction.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: All major retailers have discovered the potential of retail media and are setting up teams to develop their advertising arm. In some cases, these new teams must compete with their e-commerce colleagues who, until now, had the webshop and the online shopping experience to themselves. Retail media teams want to sell ads. That sometimes leads to friction. These are ads that, even if seamlessly woven into the webshop’s house style, can still detract from the consumer’s shopping experience.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: In some cases, these new teams must compete with their e-commerce colleagues who, until now, had the webshop and the online shopping experience to themselves. Retail media teams want to sell ads. That sometimes leads to friction. These are ads that, even if seamlessly woven into the webshop’s house style, can still detract from the consumer’s shopping experience. More conspicuous campaigns could even rub non-advertising suppliers up the wrong way.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: Retail media teams want to sell ads. That sometimes leads to friction. These are ads that, even if seamlessly woven into the webshop’s house style, can still detract from the consumer’s shopping experience. More conspicuous campaigns could even rub non-advertising suppliers up the wrong way. These frictions will prove to be growing pains because the retail media trend will not be stopped.

text: That sometimes leads to friction. These are ads that, even if seamlessly woven into the webshop’s house style, can still detract from the consumer’s shopping experience. More conspicuous campaigns could even rub non-advertising suppliers up the wrong way. These frictions will prove to be growing pains because the retail media trend will not be stopped. The United States and China show as much.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: These are ads that, even if seamlessly woven into the webshop’s house style, can still detract from the consumer’s shopping experience. More conspicuous campaigns could even rub non-advertising suppliers up the wrong way. These frictions will prove to be growing pains because the retail media trend will not be stopped. The United States and China show as much. For advertisers, the key is to weigh up whether the costs of a retail media campaign outweigh the benefits.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: More conspicuous campaigns could even rub non-advertising suppliers up the wrong way. These frictions will prove to be growing pains because the retail media trend will not be stopped. The United States and China show as much. For advertisers, the key is to weigh up whether the costs of a retail media campaign outweigh the benefits. The benefits are fairly easy to measure — at least for the online part — via clicks and realised sales.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: These frictions will prove to be growing pains because the retail media trend will not be stopped. The United States and China show as much. For advertisers, the key is to weigh up whether the costs of a retail media campaign outweigh the benefits. The benefits are fairly easy to measure — at least for the online part — via clicks and realised sales. In addition, data availability is one of the main reasons for a supplier to advertise with a retailer.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: The United States and China show as much. For advertisers, the key is to weigh up whether the costs of a retail media campaign outweigh the benefits. The benefits are fairly easy to measure — at least for the online part — via clicks and realised sales. In addition, data availability is one of the main reasons for a supplier to advertise with a retailer. Retailers hold rich customer data that are becoming harder to obtain elsewhere as third-party cookies disappear.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: For advertisers, the key is to weigh up whether the costs of a retail media campaign outweigh the benefits. The benefits are fairly easy to measure — at least for the online part — via clicks and realised sales. In addition, data availability is one of the main reasons for a supplier to advertise with a retailer. Retailers hold rich customer data that are becoming harder to obtain elsewhere as third-party cookies disappear. Advertisers can target, for example someone who likes eating biscuits, and do so close to the point of sale.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: The benefits are fairly easy to measure — at least for the online part — via clicks and realised sales. In addition, data availability is one of the main reasons for a supplier to advertise with a retailer. Retailers hold rich customer data that are becoming harder to obtain elsewhere as third-party cookies disappear. Advertisers can target, for example someone who likes eating biscuits, and do so close to the point of sale. This combination means retail media has the wind firmly in its sails at the moment, especially in Europe where data policy is becoming more restrictive.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: In addition, data availability is one of the main reasons for a supplier to advertise with a retailer. Retailers hold rich customer data that are becoming harder to obtain elsewhere as third-party cookies disappear. Advertisers can target, for example someone who likes eating biscuits, and do so close to the point of sale. This combination means retail media has the wind firmly in its sails at the moment, especially in Europe where data policy is becoming more restrictive. Search results: sponsored products.

text: Retailers hold rich customer data that are becoming harder to obtain elsewhere as third-party cookies disappear. Advertisers can target, for example someone who likes eating biscuits, and do so close to the point of sale. This combination means retail media has the wind firmly in its sails at the moment, especially in Europe where data policy is becoming more restrictive. Search results: sponsored products. As noted, retail media has different formats: the screen in the store, display or video ads on the website or in the app.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: Advertisers can target, for example someone who likes eating biscuits, and do so close to the point of sale. This combination means retail media has the wind firmly in its sails at the moment, especially in Europe where data policy is becoming more restrictive. Search results: sponsored products. As noted, retail media has different formats: the screen in the store, display or video ads on the website or in the app. But the lion’s share of retail media revenue consists of sponsored products.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: This combination means retail media has the wind firmly in its sails at the moment, especially in Europe where data policy is becoming more restrictive. Search results: sponsored products. As noted, retail media has different formats: the screen in the store, display or video ads on the website or in the app. But the lion’s share of retail media revenue consists of sponsored products. These are the first search results a customer sees after searching on a platform like Amazon or Bol.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: Search results: sponsored products. As noted, retail media has different formats: the screen in the store, display or video ads on the website or in the app. But the lion’s share of retail media revenue consists of sponsored products. These are the first search results a customer sees after searching on a platform like Amazon or Bol. The business model is much like Google Search, where the first search results are often sponsored too.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: As noted, retail media has different formats: the screen in the store, display or video ads on the website or in the app. But the lion’s share of retail media revenue consists of sponsored products. These are the first search results a customer sees after searching on a platform like Amazon or Bol. The business model is much like Google Search, where the first search results are often sponsored too. But much larger amounts are paid per click for retail media campaigns than for Google Search campaigns.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: But the lion’s share of retail media revenue consists of sponsored products. These are the first search results a customer sees after searching on a platform like Amazon or Bol. The business model is much like Google Search, where the first search results are often sponsored too. But much larger amounts are paid per click for retail media campaigns than for Google Search campaigns. Lammers says: “Google knows what you are searching for, but retailers know what you want to buy.”.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: These are the first search results a customer sees after searching on a platform like Amazon or Bol. The business model is much like Google Search, where the first search results are often sponsored too. But much larger amounts are paid per click for retail media campaigns than for Google Search campaigns. Lammers says: “Google knows what you are searching for, but retailers know what you want to buy.”. Retail media ads sit low in the marketing funnel compared with other campaigns.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: The business model is much like Google Search, where the first search results are often sponsored too. But much larger amounts are paid per click for retail media campaigns than for Google Search campaigns. Lammers says: “Google knows what you are searching for, but retailers know what you want to buy.”. Retail media ads sit low in the marketing funnel compared with other campaigns. The funnel starts broad at the top with ‘awareness’ and ends at the bottom with the purchase of a product or service.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: But much larger amounts are paid per click for retail media campaigns than for Google Search campaigns. Lammers says: “Google knows what you are searching for, but retailers know what you want to buy.”. Retail media ads sit low in the marketing funnel compared with other campaigns. The funnel starts broad at the top with ‘awareness’ and ends at the bottom with the purchase of a product or service. Lower funnel placements command relatively high prices because the chance of conversion (sale) is greater when you advertise close to the point of sale.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: Lammers says: “Google knows what you are searching for, but retailers know what you want to buy.”. Retail media ads sit low in the marketing funnel compared with other campaigns. The funnel starts broad at the top with ‘awareness’ and ends at the bottom with the purchase of a product or service. Lower funnel placements command relatively high prices because the chance of conversion (sale) is greater when you advertise close to the point of sale. Retailers can add further personalisation based on their customer data, which makes the ads even more effective and therefore more valuable.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: Retail media ads sit low in the marketing funnel compared with other campaigns. The funnel starts broad at the top with ‘awareness’ and ends at the bottom with the purchase of a product or service. Lower funnel placements command relatively high prices because the chance of conversion (sale) is greater when you advertise close to the point of sale. Retailers can add further personalisation based on their customer data, which makes the ads even more effective and therefore more valuable. The cost side also looks favourable for retailers, since the infrastructure already exists in the form of website, app and store space.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: The funnel starts broad at the top with ‘awareness’ and ends at the bottom with the purchase of a product or service. Lower funnel placements command relatively high prices because the chance of conversion (sale) is greater when you advertise close to the point of sale. Retailers can add further personalisation based on their customer data, which makes the ads even more effective and therefore more valuable. The cost side also looks favourable for retailers, since the infrastructure already exists in the form of website, app and store space. On top of that, they can use retail media channels for their own advertising messages.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: Lower funnel placements command relatively high prices because the chance of conversion (sale) is greater when you advertise close to the point of sale. Retailers can add further personalisation based on their customer data, which makes the ads even more effective and therefore more valuable. The cost side also looks favourable for retailers, since the infrastructure already exists in the form of website, app and store space. On top of that, they can use retail media channels for their own advertising messages. High revenue and low costs mean high margins.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: Retailers can add further personalisation based on their customer data, which makes the ads even more effective and therefore more valuable. The cost side also looks favourable for retailers, since the infrastructure already exists in the form of website, app and store space. On top of that, they can use retail media channels for their own advertising messages. High revenue and low costs mean high margins. According to an [estimate by Boston Consulting Group](https://www.bcg.com/publications/2022/how-media-is-shaping-retail), online could generate a gross margin of 70-90%.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: The cost side also looks favourable for retailers, since the infrastructure already exists in the form of website, app and store space. On top of that, they can use retail media channels for their own advertising messages. High revenue and low costs mean high margins. According to an [estimate by Boston Consulting Group](https://www.bcg.com/publications/2022/how-media-is-shaping-retail), online could generate a gross margin of 70-90%. Enough reason for Bol to make its advertising arm a [strategic priority](https://www.emerce.nl/nieuws/bolcom-advertising-strategische-prioriteit), alongside e-commerce and logistics services.

metadata.source_title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains

text: On top of that, they can use retail media channels for their own advertising messages. High revenue and low costs mean high margins. According to an [estimate by Boston Consulting Group](https://www.bcg.com/publications/2022/how-media-is-shaping-retail), online could generate a gross margin of 70-90%. Enough reason for Bol to make its advertising arm a [strategic priority](https://www.emerce.nl/nieuws/bolcom-advertising-strategische-prioriteit), alongside e-commerce and logistics services. Retail chains too are piling into this lucrative side income.
